lines.english: Lesson 35
lines.chinese: 第35课
lines.raw: Lesson 35 | 第35课

lines.english: Space odyssey
lines.chinese: 太空漫游
lines.raw: Space odyssey | 太空漫游

lines.english: When will it be possible for us to think seriously about colonising Mars?
lines.chinese: 我们什么时候才能认真考虑在火星上殖民？
lines.raw: When will it be possible for us to think seriously about colonising Mars? | 我们什么时候才能认真考虑在火星上殖民？

lines.english: The Moon is likely to become the industrial hub of the Solar System supplying the rocket fuels for its ships,
lines.chinese: 月球很可能成为太阳系的工业中心，为其飞船提供火箭燃料，
lines.raw: The Moon is likely to become the industrial hub of the Solar System supplying the rocket fuels for its ships, | 月球很可能成为太阳系的工业中心，为其飞船提供火箭燃料，

lines.english: easily obtainable from the lunar rocks in the form of liquid oxygen.
lines.chinese: 这些燃料以液氧的形式，可轻易地从月球岩石中获得。
lines.raw: easily obtainable from the lunar rocks in the form of liquid oxygen. | 这些燃料以液氧的形式，可轻易地从月球岩石中获得。

lines.english: The reason lies in its gravity.
lines.chinese: 原因在于它的重力。
lines.raw: The reason lies in its gravity. | 原因在于它的重力。

lines.english: Because the Moon has only an eightieth of the Earth's mass,
lines.chinese: 因为月球的质量只有地球的八十分之一，
lines.raw: Because the Moon has only an eightieth of the Earth's mass, | 因为月球的质量只有地球的八十分之一，

lines.english: it requires 97% less energy
lines.chinese: 它所需的能量要少97%，
lines.raw: it requires 97% less energy | 它所需的能量要少97%，

lines.english: to travel the quarter of a million miles from the Moon to Earth-orbit than the 200 mile-journey from Earth's surface into orbit!
lines.chinese: 即使是从月球到地球轨道25万英里的旅程，也比从地球表面进入轨道200英里的旅程所需的能量少得多！
lines.raw: to travel the quarter of a million miles from the Moon to Earth-orbit than the 200 mile-journey from Earth's surface into orbit! | 即使是从月球到地球轨道25万英里的旅程，也比从地球表面进入轨道200英里的旅程所需的能量少得多！

lines.english: This may sound fantastic, but it is easily calculated.
lines.chinese: 这听起来可能很不可思议，但它很容易计算出来。
lines.raw: This may sound fantastic, but it is easily calculated. | 这听起来可能很不可思议，但它很容易计算出来。

lines.english: To escape from the Earth in a rocket, one must travel at seven miles per second.
lines.chinese: 要乘坐火箭逃离地球，必须以每秒7英里的速度飞行。
lines.raw: To escape from the Earth in a rocket, one must travel at seven miles per second. | 要乘坐火箭逃离地球，必须以每秒7英里的速度飞行。

lines.english: The comparable speed from the Moon is only 1.5 miles per second.
lines.chinese: 而从月球逃离的可比速度仅为每秒1.5英里。
lines.raw: The comparable speed from the Moon is only 1.5 miles per second. | 而从月球逃离的可比速度仅为每秒1.5英里。

lines.english: Because the gravity on the Moon's surface is only a sixth of Earth's (remember how easily the Apollo astronauts bounded along),
lines.chinese: 因为月球表面的重力只有地球的六分之一（还记得阿波罗宇航员在月球上跳跃得多轻松吗？），
lines.raw: Because the gravity on the Moon's surface is only a sixth of Earth's (remember how easily the Apollo astronauts bounded along), | 因为月球表面的重力只有地球的六分之一（还记得阿波罗宇航员在月球上跳跃得多轻松吗？），

lines.english: it takes much less energy to accelerate to that 1.5mps than it does on Earth.
lines.chinese: 因此，在月球上加速到每秒1.5英里所需的能量比在地球上少得多。
lines.raw: it takes much less energy to accelerate to that 1.5mps than it does on Earth. | 因此，在月球上加速到每秒1.5英里所需的能量比在地球上少得多。

lines.english: Moon dwellers will be able to fly in space at only three percent of the cost of similar journeys by their terrestrial cousins.
lines.chinese: 月球居民将能够以其地球表亲进行类似旅程所需成本的3%在太空中飞行。
lines.raw: Moon dwellers will be able to fly in space at only three percent of the cost of similar journeys by their terrestrial cousins. | 月球居民将能够以其地球表亲进行类似旅程所需成本的3%在太空中飞行。

lines.english: Arthur C.Clark once suggested a revolutionary idea passes through three phases:
lines.chinese: 亚瑟·C·克拉克曾提出，一个革命性的想法会经历三个阶段：
lines.raw: Arthur C.Clark once suggested a revolutionary idea passes through three phases: | 亚瑟·C·克拉克曾提出，一个革命性的想法会经历三个阶段：

lines.english: 1. 'It's impossible--don't waste my time.'
lines.chinese: 1. “这不可能——别浪费我的时间。”
lines.raw: 1. 'It's impossible--don't waste my time.' | 1. “这不可能——别浪费我的时间。”

lines.english: 2. 'It's possible, but not worth doing.'
lines.chinese: 2. “这有可能，但不值得做。”
lines.raw: 2. 'It's possible, but not worth doing.' | 2. “这有可能，但不值得做。”

lines.english: 3. 'I said it was a good idea all along.'
lines.chinese: 3. “我一直都说这是个好主意。”
lines.raw: 3. 'I said it was a good idea all along.' | 3. “我一直都说这是个好主意。”

lines.english: The idea of colonising Mars--a world 160 times more distant than the Moon--will move decisively from the second phase to the third,
lines.chinese: 殖民火星——一个比月球远160倍的世界——的设想，将决定性地从第二阶段迈向第三阶段，
lines.raw: The idea of colonising Mars--a world 160 times more distant than the Moon--will move decisively from the second phase to the third, | 殖民火星——一个比月球远160倍的世界——的设想，将决定性地从第二阶段迈向第三阶段，

lines.english: when a significant number of people are living permanently in space.
lines.chinese: 那将是当大量人口永久居住在太空中的时候。
lines.raw: when a significant number of people are living permanently in space. | 那将是当大量人口永久居住在太空中的时候。

lines.english: Mars has an extraordinary fascination for would-be voyagers.
lines.chinese: 火星对未来的航海家们有着非凡的吸引力。
lines.raw: Mars has an extraordinary fascination for would-be voyagers. | 火星对未来的航海家们有着非凡的吸引力。

lines.english: America, Russia and Europe are filled with enthusiasts--many of them serious and senior scientists who dream of sending people to it.
lines.chinese: 美国、俄罗斯和欧洲都充满了热情的人士——其中许多是认真而资深的科学家，他们梦想着将人类送上火星。
lines.raw: America, Russia and Europe are filled with enthusiasts--many of them serious and senior scientists who dream of sending people to it. | 美国、俄罗斯和欧洲都充满了热情的人士——其中许多是认真而资深的科学家，他们梦想着将人类送上火星。

lines.english: Their aim is understandable.
lines.chinese: 他们的目标是可以理解的。
lines.raw: Their aim is understandable. | 他们的目标是可以理解的。

lines.english: It is the one world in the Solar System that is most like the Earth.
lines.chinese: 它是太阳系中与地球最相似的星球。
lines.raw: It is the one world in the Solar System that is most like the Earth. | 它是太阳系中与地球最相似的星球。

lines.english: It is a world of red sandy deserts (hence its name--the Red Planet),
lines.chinese: 这是一个红色的沙质沙漠世界（因此得名——红色星球），
lines.raw: It is a world of red sandy deserts (hence its name--the Red Planet), | 这是一个红色的沙质沙漠世界（因此得名——红色星球），

lines.english: cloudless skies, savage sandstorms, chasms wider than the Grand Canyon and at least one mountain more than twice as tall as Everest.
lines.chinese: 有着无云的天空、狂暴的沙尘暴、比大峡谷还宽的裂谷，以及至少一座比珠穆朗玛峰高两倍多的山峰。
lines.raw: cloudless skies, savage sandstorms, chasms wider than the Grand Canyon and at least one mountain more than twice as tall as Everest. | 有着无云的天空、狂暴的沙尘暴、比大峡谷还宽的裂谷，以及至少一座比珠穆朗玛峰高两倍多的山峰。

lines.english: It seems ideal for settlement.
lines.chinese: 它似乎非常适合居住。
lines.raw: It seems ideal for settlement. | 它似乎非常适合居住。
